code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个流程图，核心是一个边缘节点（EdgeNode）作为数据入口，然后分流到两个不同的处理路径。
明白了，边缘节点作为起点。您说的两个路径，一个是走MQTT协议到Broker，另一个是直接输出为遥测数据流（TelemetryStream）吗？
对，正是这样。MQTT Broker那条线要继续往下走到执行器控制器（ActuatorController），而遥测流那条线要接到PLC逻辑单元。
好的，我已经画出了主结构：EdgeNode分出两条线，一条到MQTT Broker再到ActuatorController，另一条到TelemetryStream。
等等，MQTT Broker到ActuatorController之间其实还有一个中间节点——Seven Shadow Evasion，它是从Shadow Over Water引出的。
我调整一下，在MQTT Broker和ActuatorController之间插入Seven Shadow Evasion节点。那PLC Logic的输入来源需要确认吗？
PLC Logic有两个前置条件：必须同时满足Reflex Sidestep Technique和Seven Shadow Evasion，所以要有两条线汇入。
已更新：TelemetryStream下游是Reflex Sidestep Technique，然后连到PLC Logic；同时Seven Shadow Evasion也有一条线连到PLC Logic，形成双输入。
还有一个子系统需要单独框起来——Castebook Night区域，里面包含Leaping Dodge Method，它从Shadow Over Water分支出来。
Leaping Dodge Method的节点类型是什么？看上下文它和ActuatorController功能类似，但放在子图里独立管理？
对，Leaping Dodge Method也是ActuatorController类型，但属于可选扩展模块，所以放在Castebook Night子图中，和主流程的ActuatorController区分开。
子图已创建，Shadow Over Water连线进入Castebook Night内部的Leaping Dodge Method。现在检查整体连通性。
EdgeNode的显示名称我想用Reed in the Wind这个代号，MQTT Broker对应Shadow Over Water，这样整个图就统一用Charm名称来标识了。
已重命名节点标识：reed_in_the_wind、shadow_over_water、seven_shadow_evasion、reflex_sidestep_technique、flow_like_blood、leaping_dodge_method，保持技术类型不变。
完美。最后确认一下：Reed in the Wind是起点，分出Shadow Over Water和Reflex Sidestep Technique两条线，前者经过Seven Shadow Evasion到Flow Like Blood，后者直接到Flow Like Blood，同时Shadow Over Water还有分支到Leaping Dodge Method。
结构验证完成。所有节点连通正确，Castebook Night子图包裹Leaping Dodge Method，主题设为dark模式。流程图可以定稿了。
很好，这个结构清晰展现了从边缘节点到执行控制的多路径演化，包括主流程和可选的跳跃闪避扩展模块。可以输出了。
